generator: Whalesborough Farm Resort & Spa — seed data manifest
currency: GBP — all prices in pence (e.g. GBP 100 = 10000)
verify_flag_note: Records carrying "_verify": true require client confirmation before production load.

files.purpose: Master role definitions and permission codes — load first because every downstream record can reference roles.
Master amenity codes referenced by properties.json.
Supplier directory referenced by menus.json items.
Spa treatment categories referenced by treatments.json.
30+ W Club spa treatments referenced by spa_packages.json and gift_voucher_products.json.
W Club and Lakeside Locals membership tiers.
Whalesborough Circle loyalty tier ladder (Visitor through Founder).
All 34 bookable accommodation units across Arvor, Cottage and Signature levels.
The Weir restaurant menus (breakfast, lunch, drinks, kids, dogs) with full allergen tagging per UK Food Information Regs.
4 lodge product tiers (Trelowen, Tevi, Gwelva, Bespoke). FCA_compliance_reviewed_at flag is false on every record — content cannot be published until legal sign-off.
12 curated local-area POIs with dog rules, parking, opening hours.
7 monetary and 12 experience gift voucher products.

load_order_summary: 1. Foundation: roles_permissions.json, amenities.json, suppliers.json, spa_categories.json, loyalty_tiers.json, membership_tiers.json
6. Commerce: gift_voucher_products.json (depends on treatments and packages)
post_load_actions: Run materialised view refresh on mv_user_loyalty_state.
Run rate-load job to populate accommodation_rates per property per date.
Send migration letters to existing Try.be members and Lakeside Locals subscribers before public launch.
Trigger FCA legal-review queue for every record where _verify is true or FCA_compliance_reviewed_at is false.
compliance_gates: Lodge models — FCA_compliance_reviewed_at = false on every record. No lodge sales copy ships until counsel sign-off recorded.
Membership pricing — Stripe products and prices must be live before membership_tiers.json signup flows can complete checkout.
Spa treatments — Pregnancy and cancer-safe flags must match therapist training certification.
Menus — Allergen matrix must align to UK Food Information Regulations 2014 and Natasha's Law (PPDS, 2021).
